name: maisoncbdvape-eleventy
description: MaisonCBDVape — Site e-commerce JAMstack Eleventy + Cloudflare

scripts.build: npm run css && npm run catalog && eleventy
scripts.dev: wrangler pages dev public --kv ORDERS_KV --kv OAUTH_KV --r2 MEDIA
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy public
